welcome.lede: Speak - and your text appears exactly where you'd type it.

transcription.title: Cloud or local?
transcription.lede: VOCA works with fast cloud services or entirely on your machine - fully offline. You can switch any time.

groq.desc: Whisper large-v3-turbo. The fastest option - the free tier is enough for everyday use.

openai.desc: Whisper-1. The classic, very stable. Pay-per-minute.

deepgram.desc: Nova-3. Very low latency, generous free tier.

elevenlabs.desc: Scribe-v1. Particularly good with mixed speakers and accented speech.

gemini.desc: Google's speech model - free, with solid multilingual quality.

custom.desc: Your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint - for self-hosting or private servers.

offline.desc: whisper.cpp running directly on your machine - nothing leaves your device. Pick the model size below.

models.tiny: Fastest option, good for short notes.
models.base: Solid everyday choice, a good middle ground.
models.small: Noticeably more accurate, good with technical vocabulary.
models.medium: Highest local quality, slower on startup.

shortcut.title: One key. One thought.
shortcut.lede: Hold the shortcut while you speak. Release to transcribe. Click the field to remap.
shortcut.tipBody: Hold-to-talk feels more natural than a toggle - you always know exactly what's being recorded.

useCase.title: What do you talk about most?
useCase.lede: To get technical terms, tool names, and abbreviations right, VOCA picks up a little context from your field. Choose whatever fits - multiple is fine. You can change this any time.

dev.label: Software & Engineering
dev.description: Code, frameworks, APIs, Git workflows, DevOps.

design.label: Design
design.description: Figma, tokens, components, typography, UX terms.

test.title: Give it one try.
test.lede: Hold your shortcut and say any sentence. VOCA will guide you through every step.

aiEnhancement.title: Raw or polished?
aiEnhancement.lede: Optionally, VOCA runs your transcript through a language model. It removes filler words, fixes grammar, and smooths out phrasing. Your voice stays yours. Toggle on or off any time.

groq.desc: Llama 3.3 70B Versatile. Free and very fast - our default.

anthropic.desc: Claude Haiku. Nuanced, particularly good at preserving your tone.

openai.desc: GPT-4o. Very reliable, broad language understanding.

gemini.desc: Gemini 2.0 Flash. Free, good quality, fast response times.

ollama.desc: Runs locally on your machine with a model of your choice. No API key needed.

aiEnhancement.ollamaHint: Make sure Ollama is running and the selected model is downloaded.
aiEnhancement.reuseHint: You already use {{provider}} for transcription. The existing key can be reused here.

finale.title: All set.
finale.lede: From now on, VOCA lives quietly in the menu bar. The pill at the bottom appears whenever you're recording. Everything else is in Settings.

general.uiLanguageDescription: Language of the VOCA user interface. Does not affect transcription.

privacy.historyTrackingDesc: Transcripts are stored locally and shown in History and Stats.
privacy.targetAppTrackingDesc: Remembers which app you paste into — used only for the "Most common target" stat. Stays local.

transcription.languageDescription: Language hint for transcription. "Auto" lets the provider detect the language itself.
transcription.muteOtherAudioDescription: Silences audio from other programs (music, videos, etc.) during recording. Nothing is paused. Windows only for now.
transcription.localModelDescription: Runs entirely on your device – no internet required

shortcut.description: Hold to record (push-to-talk) · Double-tap to toggle

ai.ollamaNote: Make sure Ollama is running and the selected model is downloaded.
ai.skipShortDescription: Very short recordings are inserted without AI enhancement

fillers.title: Filler Words
fillers.description: Words on this list are stripped from the transcription before AI enhancement runs, when the toggle in the top right is on.
fillers.empty: No filler words yet. Common candidates: um, uh, like, you know, basically, literally, actually, right, so, also, halt, quasi.

errors.apiKeyInvalid: This key doesn't work. Check if it was copied in full, or create a new one.
errors.apiKeyFormat: That doesn't look like a {{provider}} key. Please double-check.
errors.apiKeyEmpty: Please paste a key before continuing.
errors.noInternet: No connection. VOCA will check the key again as soon as you're back online.
errors.microphoneUnavailable: Microphone access denied. Open System Settings and allow VOCA to use the microphone.
errors.microphoneUnavailableMac: VOCA doesn't have permission for your microphone. Open System Settings, then Privacy & Security, and enable VOCA under "Microphone". The app will restart automatically.
errors.microphoneUnavailableWindows: Windows is currently blocking microphone access. Open Settings, then Privacy & Security, and allow VOCA under "Microphone".
errors.shortcutConflict: This shortcut is already in use. Try another - VOCA plays nicely with almost all of them.
errors.aiEnhancementFailed: AI enhancement failed - the original text was used.
